templates.name: Welcome Announcement
templates.subject: Welcome to {{company}}
templates.body:
Hello {{name}},

Welcome to {{company}}. We are excited to have you with us.

Best regards,
{{senderName}}

templates.name: Security Notice
templates.subject: Action Required: Security Update
templates.body:
Hello {{name}},

Please review the new security policy and update your password before {{dueDate}}.

Thank you,
Security Team

templates.name: Event Invitation
templates.subject: Invitation: {{eventName}}
templates.body:
Hello {{name}},

You are invited to {{eventName}} on {{eventDate}} at {{eventLocation}}.

Regards,
Event Committee
